title: 3D Gaussian Rendering
description: System renders 3D Gaussian splat scenes including deferred shading and patch-based rendering

components.name: GaussianRenderer
methods: render(gaussians[B,N,14], cam_view[B,V,4,4], bg_color, intrinsics) -> {images_pred, alphas_pred, depths_pred}
components.description: Standard (non-deferred) Gaussian renderer. Loops over batch & view chunks, calls gsplat rasterization with RGB+ED mode.

components.name: GaussianRendererDeferred
methods: render(gaussians[B,N,14], cam_view, bg_color, intrinsics, patch_size=None) -> {images_pred, alphas_pred, depths_pred}
render_deferred(means3D, opacity, scales, rotations, rgbs, viewmat, Ks, backgrounds, H, W, near_plane, far_plane, patch_size) -> dict
render_standard(means3D, opacity, scales, rotations, rgbs, viewmat, Ks, backgrounds, H, W, near_plane, far_plane) -> dict
components.description: Extended renderer with deferred backpropagation support and OOM-safe downscaling. Selects render_func at init based on opt.deferred_bp flag. Supports 3DGuT via raster_kwargs.

components.name: DeferredBP
methods: render(xyz, feature, scale, rotation, opacity, test_w2c, test_intr, W, H, near_plane, far_plane, backgrounds, raster_kwargs) -> (image, alpha, depth)  [static]
forward(ctx, xyz, feature, scale, rotation, opacity, test_w2cs, test_intr, W, H, near_plane, far_plane, backgrounds, raster_kwargs) -> (images, alphas, depths)
components.description: Custom autograd Function. Forward runs rasterization per-view in no_grad context storing results in requires_grad tensors; backward re-runs rasterization with grad enabled to propagate gradients to GS parameters.

components.name: DeferredBPPatch
methods: forward(ctx, xyz, features, scaling, rotation, opacity, C2W, Ks, width, height, near_plane, far_plane, backgrounds, patch_size, raster_kwargs) -> (colors[B,V,3,H,W], alphas[B,V,1,H,W], depths[B,V,1,H,W])
components.description: Patch-based deferred rendering. Divides the image into (patch_size[0] x patch_size[1]) tiles, renders each patch independently by shifting cx/cy, then assembles full image. Saves GPU memory by rendering small tiles sequentially.

use_cases: Render 3D Gaussian scene (standard mode) — GaussianRenderer.render() → rasterization()
Render 3D Gaussian scene (deferred mode, full image) — GaussianRendererDeferred.render() → render_deferred() → DeferredBP.apply()
Render 3D Gaussian scene (patch-based deferred) — GaussianRendererDeferred.render(patch_size=...) → render_deferred() → DeferredBPPatch.apply()
Render with OOM fallback downscaling — GaussianRendererDeferred.render_downscale() → resize outputs with F.interpolate
Render with 3DGuT backend — GaussianRendererDeferred (use_3dgut=True, raster_kwargs with_ut=True)
Export Gaussian scene to PLY — save_ply() with opacity pruning + inverse activation
Load Gaussian scene from PLY — load_ply() with sigmoid/exp activation
key_relationships: LatentRecon instantiates GaussianRendererDeferred when opt.deferred_bp=True, else GaussianRenderer
GaussianRendererDeferred delegates to DeferredBP.apply() (full-image deferred) or DeferredBPPatch.apply() (patch-based) in render_deferred()
DeferredBP and DeferredBPPatch both depend on gsplat.rendering.rasterization
key_data_flow: Input gaussians tensor [B, N, 14]: channels = pos(3) + opacity(1) + scale(3) + rotation(4) + rgb(3)
cam_view [B, V, 4, 4] transposed to viewmat [B, V, 4, 4] for gsplat convention
intrinsics [B, V, 4] (fx, fy, cx, cy) → built into Ks [B, V, 3, 3]
DeferredBPPatch shifts cx/cy per tile: new_cx = cx - m*patch_w, new_cy = cy - n*patch_h
important_notes: GaussianRendererDeferred.oom_downscale_factors=[1,2,4,8] but OOM retry logic is currently commented out
DeferredBP.backward() re-runs full forward to compute gradients (memory-efficient but slower)
DeferredBPPatch requires height % patch_h == 0 and width % patch_w == 0
Compatible PLY format: inverse_sigmoid(opacity), log(scales), normalised SHs
